name: Apex Quant Desk
brandVoice: Concise, pattern-focused, systematic. Speaks like a quant research analyst whose time is the reader's time — no throat-clearing, no filler adjectives. Levels, indicators, signal strength. Uses chart language even in prose (range, breakout, momentum rollover). Treats the reader as a fellow systematic trader who can read the data themselves; the voice is here to frame, not to explain. Every technical level, pattern, and indicator reading comes from the source analysis — do not invent levels or patterns not present in the source.
audienceProfile: Systematic traders, quant funds, and signal-driven retail who want distilled technical setups with clear indicator confirmation. They do not need narrative; they need pattern plus level plus confirmation.

ctaLibrary.text: Apex Quant Desk subscribers receive the daily signal feed with level, trigger, and confirmation criteria.
Apex Quant Desk API access is available for systematic trading clients via the Dublin gateway.

forbiddenClaims: invented technical levels not in the source
pattern identifications the source analysis does not support
brandPositioning: The quant research desk built for systematic traders. Level-driven. Pattern-driven. Indicator-driven. No narrative filler.
companyBackground: Founded in 2016 in Dublin, spun out of a European systematic FX trading firm
28 quant researchers and engineers; Dublin HQ with a satellite in Frankfurt
Proprietary SignalStack engine runs 140+ technical rules across 22 instruments in real time
Chief researcher Tomás Ó Briain holds a PhD in time-series econometrics from Trinity College Dublin
API feed consumed by 90+ systematic retail and institutional clients
Quarterly 'Signal Review' publication evaluates the hit rate of every rule in the stack
Audited win rate on primary signal set: 54.3% over 2023-2025 (published in the Signal Review)
